text:
> >Synopsis:       boot.flp file is too big to image on to floppy

1. What release are you talking about?  That would help muchly.

2. If it's 2.2.5 then that's sure news to me as I've made dozens of
   floppies from that image.  How are you attempting to make it and
   how are you xfering the image in question?

					Jordan
